test.name: Accept offer for Submitted Talent

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Open Portal And Login To Vms
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait For Page Loader To Disappear
Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.arg: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait For Page Loader To Disappear
Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.arg: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait For Page Loader To Disappear
Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.arg: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait For Page Loader To Disappear
Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.arg: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Wait For Page Loader To Disappear
Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.arg: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.arg: Open Portal And Login To HCS
Open Portal And Login To VMS
Open Portal And Login To MYDEF
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Click Feature Menu Option in Vms
Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Page should have contained text 'No records available' but did not.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.
kw.status: Page should have contained text 'No records available' but did not.

kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Fail
kw.arg: No records available for search text provided
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.

kw.name: Get WebElements
kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Fail
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg: ${cell_locator} = xpath=(//table[contains(@class,'k-grid-table')]//tbody//tr)[1]/td[1]//*[self::a or self::span or self::button or self::div]
kw.arg: xpath=(${ROWS_XPATH})[1]/td[${col_index}]//*[self::a or self::span or self::button or self::div]
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.msg: 'on assignment' does not contain 'job is offered'
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
kw.status: 'on assignment' does not contain 'job is offered'
'on assignment' does not contain 'job is offered'

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

test.status: 'on assignment' does not contain 'job is offered'
